name: Greenies Golf Club
address: 26181 Avenida Aeropuerto, San Juan Capistrano, CA 92675
about: Greenies Golf Club is a golf simulator venue offering both public and member access to its facilities. The venue provides a range of services including pro shop, club fitting, and private event hosting, with a notable focus on accommodating various group sizes. Pricing is structured hourly for non-members and offers 24/7 access for members, positioning itself as a flexible option for both casual players and serious golfers seeking to improve their game.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 member access for flexible practice scheduling
On-site pro shop and club fitting services for equipment needs
Accommodates private events for groups up to 20 guests

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB policy suggests outside food is allowed
No mention of alcohol service on premises

simulator_hardware.notes: No specific simulator hardware information provided

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No information provided, but it's standard to bring your own clubs for simulator sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue operates on a BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) policy.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulation take?
faq.answer: No specific time mentioned, but typical simulator rounds take approximately 1-2 hours depending on player pace.

faq.answer: No specific information about kid-friendliness is available.
